title: Classic Chicken Wings for Afternoon Tea
description: A delightful British-inspired dish perfect for an afternoon tea. Crispy fried chicken wings served with a side of tangy sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and a pinch of salt.
Dredge the chicken wings in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
Dip the floured wings in the beaten eggs and then in the breading mix.
Place the breaded wings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the melted butter over the wings and toss to coat.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
While the wings are baking, mix together the hot sauce and honey for the glaze.
Once the wings are done, toss them in the glaze and return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
